student_text:
That's really great to hear that we're having a party! I've been waiting for this
In my opinion, I would prefer having a party in the classroom because It's private and there would be so many people at the park. So I rather have a party in the classroom.
For activities and games, I suggest to play roblay, watch a horror movie or maybe dancing because everyone loves those. Including me, also I went to watch a movie with my friends. It's fun and we enjoyed it so that's the reason I suggested those activities
For food and drinks, I really recommend pizza and mcdonald for food because It tastes very delicious and there are my favourite. For drinks, I'd love to have pepsi, water and cola just because It's refreshing.
Reply Soon!
Dragon
